reasoning: Based on search results, as of late June/August 2025, the closest candidates are Praggnanandhaa (live rating around 2778) and World Champion D Gukesh (live rating around 2776). Gukesh previously reached a peak live rating of approximately 2791.9 in early February 2025 but has since dropped over 15 points. At the 2775+ level, gaining 22 to 24 points to reach 2800 requires an extraordinary tournament performance (typically going undefeated with +4 or +5 against elite competition) or a continuous string of successful events without losses. While there are multiple strong candidates who are young and improving (Pragg, Gukesh, Nodirbek, and Wei Yi), achieving this over just the final 5 months of the year is mathematically and historically very difficult. Given the FIDE results for August 2025 indicated no major rating changes at the very top, I estimate an 18% chance that one of these players makes the leap to 2800 before the end of 2025, aligning closely with recent market estimates.
